Package simulation

package simulation
  • Class
    Description
    Arrival
    Creates Arrival-instances that create new Customer-instances and set's their next eventType.
    Clock
    Creates Clock-instances that track time during the simulation.
    Controller
    Controller class is the main class of the simulation, it handles the event queue and the arrival of customers.
    Customer
    Creates Customer-instances that travel through the simulation.
    Database
    Database class handles the connection to the database and provides methods for saving customers, retrieving service analysis, and deleting the database.
    Event
    Event class represents an event in the simulation, containing information about the time of the event, the type of event, and the customer involved.
    EventList
    EventList is a priority queue that holds events in the simulation in the required order.
    EventType
    EventType is an enum that defines the different types of events that can occur in the simulation.
    ServicePoint
    Service point entity with a defined amount of employees.
